vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

risk.desc: Salt-air resistant coating may not be sufficient for long-term exposure
risk.mit: Apply additional protective coating and conduct accelerated aging tests

risk.desc: High-wind launch capability may be compromised by loose components
risk.mit: Ensure all fasteners are securely tightened and conduct wind tunnel tests

risk.desc: Limited service access may hinder maintenance and inspection
risk.mit: Design additional service access panels and conduct field serviceability tests

risk.desc: Thermal expansion may cause misalignment of critical interfaces
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion joints and conduct thermal cycling tests

risk.desc: Process limitations may affect dimensional accuracy
risk.mit: Conduct first article inspection and adjust process parameters as needed

cooling inlet -> motor pod -> exhaust
wing spar -> center body pod -> cooling inlet
equipment bay door -> center body pod
motor pylon harness -> center body pod -> equipment bay

bolted connection for motor pylon mount
harness passthrough for equipment bay door

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)

verify.rule: All required fields and evidence_features are present.
Estimated mass is within the expected range for the subsystem.
P0 internal_feature_targets are reflected in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
Critical joints have visible locking or preload evidence.
Boundary conditions are defined for CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: The spar may experience fatigue due to repetitive high-wind loading.
risk.mit: Implement a fatigue analysis and consider material upgrades or design modifications.

risk.desc: The anti-rotation key may fail under extreme bending loads.
risk.mit: Evaluate the key's design and material selection for higher load conditions.

risk.desc: The service access panel may not provide adequate clearance for maintenance.
risk.mit: Review the design to ensure sufficient clearance for access and tooling.

risk.desc: The internal channel may not provide sufficient clearance for harness routing.
risk.mit: Adjust the channel dimensions to ensure adequate clearance for all harnesses.

risk.desc: The rib connections may not be robust enough for the expected loads.
risk.mit: Perform a detailed structural analysis and reinforce connections if necessary.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.path: spar_socket -> rib -> carry_through -> fuselage_frames
spar_socket -> rib -> carry_through -> fuselage_frames
anti_rotation_key -> rib -> carry_through -> fuselage_frames

generated_parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
generated_parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: Check if all required evidence_features appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Verify if the mass_est_g is a numeric value and within expected range.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in part_tree and geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Ensure P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal connection_type and required_feature.
verify.rule: Check if adjacent interfaces have matching connection_type and required_feature.

verify.value: Visible locking evidence for bolted interfaces.
verify.rule: Ensure critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.
Boundary conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion issues due to high solar exposure.
risk.mit: Implement thermal expansion joints and use materials with low thermal expansion coefficients.

risk.desc: Risk of control surface interference with rib structure during motion.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient clearance between control surfaces and rib structure.

risk.desc: Risk of spar misalignment during assembly.
risk.mit: Include alignment pins and clear assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress due to improper sealing of lightening pockets.
risk.mit: Use water-resistant sealants and ensure proper sealing of lightening pockets.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to inadequate load path continuity.
risk.mit: Ensure continuous load path from spar to fuselage frames with appropriate fittings.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Structural support and aerodynamic profile for the wing

physics_paths.description: Transfers wing bending loads from the root to the tip
Guides airflow over the wing for lift generation
Transfers heat from solar exposure to the wing structure
Supports the motion of control surfaces
Distributes atmospheric pressure over the wing surface
Provides access for maintenance and inspection

integration_opportunities.description: Supports the installation of control surfaces
Supports the installation of wing skins
Supports the installation of wing spars

generated_parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
generated_parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

requirements.description: Servo pocket must securely hold MG90S or DS215MG servo
Control horn mount must securely hold control horn
Pushrod channel must guide pushrod from servo to control horn
Control surface cutout must allow control surface movement
Access cover must be removable for field service
Connector socket must mate with electrical hub
Mounting flange must securely attach to wing structure
Thermal dissipation fins must dissipate heat from servo
Service access panel must provide access to control horn and servo

verify.rule: All required fields are present and valid.

risk.desc: Potential for corrosion in salt-air environment.
risk.mit: Apply corrosion-resistant coating to all exposed surfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress due to high ambient temperatures.
risk.mit: Design thermal dissipation fins for efficient heat transfer.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to high vibration during launch.
risk.mit: Ensure cables have adequate strain relief and bend radius.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to loose tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter tolerance controls for critical interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate access for field service.
risk.mit: Ensure all serviceable components are easily accessible.

physics_paths.description: Servo actuates control horn via pushrod linkage
Heat from servo dissipated to ambient air
Field service access to control horn and servo

integration_opportunities.description: Optimize mounting flange for wing structure integration
Ensure connector socket aligns with electrical hub
Enhance thermal dissipation fins for better heat transfer

verification_focus.description: Test servo pocket and control horn mount for durability and alignment
Verify connector socket integrity and signal transmission
Monitor thermal dissipation efficiency and surface temperature

generated_parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
generated_parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

requirements: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window
Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance
Offshore wind farm inspection, salt-air resistant, high-wind launch capable
Suggested material: EPP foam core + CFRP spar, process: FDM + foam

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: The blueprint must include all specified internal features and interfaces.
The mass estimate must be a numeric value within the vehicle's mass budget.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are mapped to geometry_ops.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal names and DOF.
verify.rule: Adjacent interfaces must include connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.

verify.value: Visible locking evidence and preload intent are included.

risk.desc: The gimbal mount may not be sufficiently robust for high-wind launches.
risk.mit: Increase the thickness of the gimbal mount and perform wind tunnel testing.

risk.desc: The service access window may not provide adequate access for maintenance.
risk.mit: Enlarge the service access window or add additional access points.

risk.desc: The thermal dissipation path may not be sufficient to prevent overheating.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the thermal channels and add additional cooling fins.

risk.desc: The camera pod mount may not be able to withstand the forces during catapult launches.
risk.mit: Strengthen the camera pod mount and perform stress analysis.

risk.desc: The payload insert may not be securely attached during high-wind conditions.
risk.mit: Add additional fasteners or use a different mounting method.

risk.desc: Potential thermal dissipation issues due to limited cooling channels.
risk.mit: Increase the number of coolant channels and improve airflow around the battery bay.

risk.desc: Risk of cable strain due to lack of strain relief geometry.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief features such as clamps and grommets at cable exits.

risk.desc: Risk of improper connector mating due to lack of keying or labeling.
risk.mit: Add keying or labeling to connectors to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at wing root due to load path discontinuity.
risk.mit: Ensure continuous structural load path from spar to fuselage frames.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly errors due to ambiguous assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly_sequence with tool, torque, and datum per step.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Slide-in li-ion battery pack bay on CG rail, BMS and connector access

physics_paths.description: Structural loads from wing bending and servo actuation transferred to battery bay shell.
Electrical power flow from battery pack to BMS and XT60 connector.
Thermal dissipation from battery pack to battery bay shell.
Linear motion of battery pack along CG rail marks.
External atmospheric pressure on service access window.
Human access for maintenance and service through service access hole.

manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: vertical, inspection: visual and CMM
